subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I take refuge at the gate of Thy mercy and grace, that Thou mayest guard these two noble children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی الوذ بباب الرحمه و الالطاف ان تحرس هذین الطفلین النجیبین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for protection
